title: Project CI nightly 23:00 VN; harness prose goes cadence-neutral
action: Per ci-cadence D1/D2. (A) Workflows — project-level: in .github/workflows/ci.yml and windows.yml replace the push/pull_request triggers with schedule [cron '0 16 * * *'] (= 23:00 Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh; say so in a comment) plus workflow_dispatch; in ci.yml widen the auto-issue step's condition from github.event_name == 'push' to github.event_name != 'pull_request' (schedule and manual runs must still file verify-red issues; matrix.node-version == 20 single-leg gate stays). Keep concurrency, steps, permissions otherwise byte-identical. (B) Harness prose — cadence-neutral, never naming push or 23h: in the 8 surfaces that literally say the full suite 'runs on push' (AGENTS.block.md item 16 + root AGENTS.md item 16 kept byte-parallel, bee-hive SKILL.md ~:164, bee-planning ~:122, bee-swarming ~:129, routing-and-contracts ~:288, knowledge suite-topology R4 ~:90, docs/config-reference.md commands table row, .bee/config-sample.json _doc.commands) reword to the effect of 'it runs on the project's own CI cadence — push, nightly, or scheduled, the host workflow decides — and auto-files a verify-red issue when red'. Surgical rewording only, keep each sentence's surrounding structure. Then: re-render mirrors (onboard_bee --apply + render_plugin_skill_trees), bee knowledge index (R4 edit), release_manifest --write, impact_registry --write if closures changed (prose-only: expect no change, still run --check).

truths: workflows trigger only on schedule (16:00 UTC) + manual dispatch
auto-issue step fires on scheduled/manual failures, still single-leg, never on PRs
zero harness surfaces name a concrete CI cadence (grep-proof: 'runs on push' gone; no '23' in harness prose)
AGENTS twins byte-parallel; mirrors + manifest regenerated; knowledge index/check green

verify: node scripts/test_ci_verify_issue.mjs && node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: project CI moved to nightly 23:00 VN (cron 0 16 UTC) + manual dispatch on both workflows; auto-issue fires on any non-PR failure; all 8 harness surfaces reworded cadence-neutral (grep-proof 0), mirrors+manifest+knowledge green
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_ci_verify_issue.mjs && node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
